svg.aria-label: Matteo Di Salvo — Founder at Lumindis Studio, Milan. Full-stack web developer. Languages: Java, C#, PHP, Python, JavaScript, TypeScript, HTML, CSS. Frameworks: React, Vite, Tailwind, Node.js, MySQL, Git, GitHub. Visit lumindis.com.

g.text: Founder of Lumindis Studio — I build fast, premium websites with a
dark, glassmorphic aesthetic. Full-stack across the web: from motion
& design systems on the front end to clean APIs on the back.
